trades.reasoning: Score 100 with full signal confirmation (RSI 68.9, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, volume surge) on a risk-on day.
Score 100 with identical full signal confirmation to ACMR, indicating strong institutional participation.
Score 100 with all five bullish signals present including volume surge, fitting the multi-signal confirmation rule from strategy memory.
Score 95 with the four core confirmation signals (RSI bullish zone, MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, volume surge), fills the last open slot on a risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Markets were risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P 500 +0.9%. With 4 open slots and cash above the $500 threshold, we deployed into the four best multi-signal-confirmed momentum candidates while holding all existing positions.

market_education.summary_en: Broad market strength lifted both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 today, with tech and growth names leading gains. Momentum indicators across a wide range of stocks showed bullish crossovers and rising volume, suggesting broad participation rather than a narrow rally. No specific news catalysts were available in today's data feed.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤全面走強,納斯達克及標普500指數同步上揚,科技股及成長股領漲。多隻股票同步出現MACD黃金交叉及成交量放大,顯示這波升勢參與面較廣,並非個別板塊帶動。今日數據來源未提供具體新聞事件作為漲勢的解釋。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, on the theory that stocks moving up tend to keep moving up in the near term. Today we looked for stocks confirmed by multiple technical signals together — RSI, MACD, price versus moving average, and trading volume — rather than relying on just one indicator.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入已經處於上升趨勢的股票,理論基礎是短期內上漲的股票傾向於持續上漲。今天我們尋找的是同時獲得多項技術指標確認的股票——包括RSI、MACD、股價與移動平均線的關係,以及成交量——而不是單靠一個指標做判斷。
